parameters: \laeSo, who's name did you hear first? Mine, or \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0]?
\laeI'm asking you... why did you come this far?
We know you're in the way.
\laeI see... so that's how it's being told now.
\laeYou sound certain. I will humor you.
\laeIf you can defeat me, the way forward will open.
\laeI hope you understand that the closer you are to
\c[18]Apocalypse\c[0], the easier it is for \c[18]him\c[0] to strike.
\laeThis is as far as words go.
\p3Now that Laeryidyean's dead, I'm sure \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0] won't be happy.
\p4So what, we have a target on our backs now?
\p2We got our lead though! Did you hear what he said? Telluria!
\samI think this is a cause for celebration.
Let's get back to Haven Harbor...
GabText The team walked back through the forest.
GabText Their mission completed, they remained in silence.
GabText The day was still ripe.
GabText They prepared for the celebration that they'd be greeted with.
Years... centuries... no, millenia of harsh
conditions have eaten away at this grave.
Anything that might have resembled words is long gone.
Years... centuries... no, millenia of harsh
conditions have eaten away at this grave.
Anything that might have resembled words is long gone.
